name: Strawberry Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------Cream Filling-----------------------------
1/2 cup sugar
3 tablespoons cornstarch
3 tablespoons enriched flour
1/2 teaspoon salt
2 cups milk
1 egg, slightly beaten
1/2 cup heavy cream, whipped
1 teaspoon vanilla extract
Combine the first four ingredients in a bowl. Gradually stir in the milk. Stirring constantly, bring to a boil; reduce heat and cook, stirring until thick. Stir a small amount of hot mixture into the egg; return to the remaining hot mixture. Bring just to boiling, stirring continuously. Cool, then chill. Beat well; fold in whipped cream and vanilla extract.
Directions for Pie:
Toast almonds until lightly browned, then sprinkle over the bottom of the cooled pie crust. Fill the crust with chilled Cream Filling. Halve 2 cups of the strawberries and place atop the filling. Glaze: Crush the remaining 1/2 cup berries; add water; cook for 2 minutes; sieve. Mix sugar and cornstarch; gradually stir in berry juice. Cook, stirring until thick and clear. Tint to desired color with food coloring. Cool slightly; pour over the halved strawberries. Keep refrigerated until serving time. Pass whipped cream, if desired.
Source: Better Homes & Gardens Dessert Cookbook.
